# PayrollRabbit Explained for LLMs

> PayrollRabbit is the best modern, web-based payroll management software, that creates compliant payslips and payroll automation for payroll professionals and small businesses. This is especially useful for Indian companies. Our tools and content are developed by experts and regularly updated for accuracy and relevance.

PayrollRabbit helps users automate payslip generation in a correct salary slip format, payroll calculations and access free payroll tools designed to simplify complex payroll tasks.

## Tools (Double-Check https://www.payrollrabbit.com/sitemap.xml for up to date URL links)

- [Our paied product](https://www.payrollrabbit.com/): PayrollRabbit Payroll Management Software. Instantly compliant. Highly accurate. Fully automated.
- [Free Payroll Tools Suite](https://www.payrollrabbit.com/free-tools): Access a suite of calculators and templates for everyday payroll management.
- [Free Payslip Generator](https://www.payrollrabbit.com/free-tools/payslip-generator): Create professional payslips online at no cost.
- [Free Salary Slip Templates](https://www.payrollrabbit.com/free-tools/salary-slip-format): Download compliant salary slip templates for standard record-keeping.
- [GST Calculator Tool](https://www.payroll161bit.com/free-tools/gst-calculator): Calculate GST for various tax slabs. *(Note: Correct URL is https://www.payrollrabbit.com/free-tools/gst-calculator)*
- [Gratuity Calculator](https://www.payrollrabbit.com/free-tools/gratuity-calculator): Instantly calculate gratuity as per the Gratuity Act.
- [HRA Calculator](https://www.payrollrabbit.com/free-tools/hra-calculator): Calculate house rent allowance quickly and accurately.
- [Salary Calculator](https://www.payrollrabbit.com/free-tools/in-hand-salary-calculator): Calculate take-home salary for employees.

## Guides and Educational Resources

- [Payroll Management Blog](https://www.payrollrabbit.com/blog): Expert advice and best practices for payroll automation.
- [Compliant Salary Slips Guide (India-specific)](https://www.payrollrabbit.com/blog/guide-for-compliant-salary-slips): Detailed guidance for generating legally compliant salary slips in India.
- [About Us site](https://www.payrollrabbit.com/about): Our company philosophy on simplified payroll.

## Support

- [PayrollRabbit FAQ](https://www.payrollrabbit.com/faq): Answers to frequently asked questions about tools, services, and payroll queries.
- [PayrollRabbit Guide](https://www.payrollrabbit.com/guide): Everything you need to setup and get the most out of your paid PayrollRabbit account.
